title: Chiridium lijndenianum
taxonomy: Chiridium lijndenianum belongs to the genus Chiridium, which is a group of extinct, four-legged arthropods. The genus Chiridium is classified under the phylum Chelicerata, a subphylum of arthropods that includes spiders, scorpions, and horseshoe crabs. Chiridium lijndenianum is also classified as a member of the class Arachnomorpha. Further classification places it within the order Eurypterida and the subclass Eurypterida as well. The specific classification may vary depending on the source and the specific characteristics of the species.
intro: There is no information available on the plant Chiridium lijndenianum.
